creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the report and patches Sam

If you could combine all the patches to the port (www/foswiki/*) into a single unified diff that would be great.

For any patches to the foswiki source code (such as tools/fix_file_permissions.sh), these need to take the form of an addition of a patch-* file to the files/ port directory.

You can do this using the 'makepatch' target which will automatically create them in the right place/format. For instructions see:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#slow-patch

Basically:

1) make patch
2) cd to the WRKSRC dir where the sources are extracted
3) cp <file> <file>.orig
4) make changes to <file>
5) go back to the port dir and `make makepatch`

This will produce a files/patch-* file for each <file> <file>.orig combination in the WRKSRC dir
